name: Suhas Adiga
biography:
I'm Suhas Adiga, an M.S. graduate from the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR), Bengaluru, where I worked under the supervision of [Prof. Umesh V. Waghmare](https://scholar.google.co.in/citations?user=EY7WIIwAAAAJ&hl=en). My research lies at the intersection of Materials Science and Machine Learning, with a particular focus on data-driven strategies for the discovery and design of functional materials.

Beginning in October 2026, I will join [Prof. Matthew J. Rosseinsky](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_Rosseinsky), [Dr. George R. Darling](https://openalex.org/authors/A5080860663), and [Dr. Chris Collins](https://www.liverpool.ac.uk/people/chris-michael-collins) at the [Materials Innovation Factory, University of Liverpool](https://www.liverpool.ac.uk/materials-innovation-factory/), as part of Cohort 3 of the [EPSRC CDT in Digital and Automated Materials Chemistry](https://www.liverpool.ac.uk/doctoral-training/digital-and-automated-materials-chemistry/).
